hooks.command: node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>s+=c).on("end",()=>{try{const d=JSON.parse(s);const cmd=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.command)||"";if(cmd.split(/[;&|\n]+/).some(p=>/^(git|gh)(\s|$)/.test(p.trim()))){process.stderr.write("kody blocks git/gh — the wrapper handles VCS; do not run git or gh commands\n");process.exit(2)}}catch{}})'
